cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen5 — move priority table
cases.note: ExtremeSpeed +2 priority introduced in Gen 5 (ERRATA #7). Was +1 in Gen 1-4.

cases.description: Multi-hit moves use 35/35/15/15 hit distribution in Gen 5

cases.note: Struggle recoil = floor(max_hp / 4) in Gen 5, unchanged from Gen 3-4.
Charizard is 4x weak to Rock; Stealth Rock deals 1/8 × 4 = 1/2 max HP.
Blastoise is neutral to Rock; Stealth Rock deals 1/8 max HP.

cases.description: Sheer Force suppresses Life Orb recoil when the used move is boosted by Sheer Force
cases.source: Showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Gen5 — SheerForce + LifeOrb interaction
cases.note: When Sheer Force activates on a move (removing secondary effects), Life Orb recoil is also suppressed. Unique Sheer Force interaction.

cases.description: Gen 5 has exactly 17 types; Fairy type does not exist
cases.note: Fairy was introduced in Gen 6. Gen 5 type chart has 17 entries.

cases.description: Sturdy in Gen 5 acts as a Focus Sash at full HP — survives any one-hit KO with 1 HP remaining
cases.note: Sturdy was reworked in Gen 5 from OHKO-immunity-only (Gen 3-4) to full Focus-Sash-like behavior at full HP.

cases.description: Ability-summoned weather in Gen 5 has no turn limit (Drizzle, Drought, Sand Stream, Snow Warning)
cases.note: Permanent ability weather in Gen 5. Duration capped at 5 turns (8 with rock) starting in Gen 6.

cases.description: Consecutive Protect uses halve success rate each time: 100%, 50%, 25%, 12.5%...
cases.note: Gen 5 Protect uses halving. Gen 6 changed this to tripling reduction (ERRATA #9).
